title: ItemCleaner
description: Improve server performance, reduce server lag, and clear dropped items by moving them to a public chest.
body:
Improve server performance, reduce server lag, clears dropped items and moves them to a public chest where all players can open it just in case u died or lost something.

1. /trashclean | removes all items from the trash chest
2. /trash | Opens the trash chest
3. /trashtime ( time ) | Config the time for each clean 

* The chest its semi-ulimited and stacks all items. 
* Theres also a scrollbar to move in the trash menu.
  
  
![Trash](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38874d095365af267ec9a5f1fbde9a3cd6a99908.png)
